title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: HOODLAND PUBLIC LIBRARY DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. Provides access to Wi-Fi, a water fountain, and public bathrooms. 24525 E Welches Road Welches, OR 97067 Eligibility: Varies by site Hours: Monday 10am-4pm, Tuesday 10am-6pm, Wednesday noon-7pm, Thursday-Friday noon-6pm, Saturday noon-5pm (503) 622-3460 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 622-3460 Main phone Main phone (503) 622-3460 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call ahead or visit website to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Loation is easy to reach by Mt Hood Express Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOODLAND PUBLIC LIBRARY
